Status breakdown (retained history): TIMEOUT: 1 | COMPLETED: 1

This page keeps the current dashboard data model but presents the report in a denser, issue-first format so engine output is easier to compare with Open Scans.

Some findings are from a previous scan run. Pages unchanged since the last scan are shown with their most recent known data (up to ~33 hours of history).

Changes Since Last Scan

Compared with the previous retained run, total violations changed by -1 and pages scanned changed by +0.

The comparison uses retained run history so the report stays stable even when recent pages were skipped unchanged.

Pages with Most Errors

Focus on the pages that accumulate the most findings to move the largest backlog first.

Issues

Filter the rule cards by severity, tool, and WCAG version. The cards stay anchored to stable rule IDs so weekly comparisons remain easy to review.

VITAL-Core is an independent open source project. It is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the websites and agencies scanned by this dashboard.
